data.name: PositionCoverInsideFrameNote
data.value: Position the entire book cover inside the frame and click capture.

data.name: IsbnIdentified
data.value: ISBN identified: {0}. You can now complete the metadata search.

data.name: TitleIdentified
data.value: Title identified: {0}. You can now search via API.

data.name: NoMatchFoundCover
data.value: No clear match found from the cover image.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteAuthor
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this author?

data.name: NoBooksFoundCriteria
data.value: No books found matching your criteria.

data.name: SelectFromResultToPopulate
data.value: Select from results to populate form

data.name: UseCoverLookupInfo
data.value: Use the Cover Lookup with an ISBN to find one automatically.

data.name: UseThisImageUrl
data.value: Would you like to use this image URL for the book?

data.name: NoAuthorsAssociatedDescription
data.value: No authors associated. Use the search form on the right to find and add authors.

data.name: EnterTitleToSearch
data.value: Please enter a Title to search.

data.name: NoBooksFoundTitle
data.value: No books found matching that title.

data.name: FoundResultsFromApi
data.value: Found {0} results from API. Select one from the list below.

data.name: MappingCategoryWarning
data.value: Could not accurately map external category '{0}' to local categories. You'll need to manually select one.

data.name: AuthorNotFoundCreateAssign
data.value: Author '{0}' not found in local database. Do you want to create and assign it for this book?

data.name: FieldsPopulatedReview
data.value: Fields populated from selected book. Please review and save.

data.name: CoverImageFoundCatalogs
data.value: Cover image found in our catalogs! See preview below.

data.name: NoCoverImageFoundIsbn
data.value: No cover image found for this ISBN in any of our connected libraries.

data.name: CoverUrlApplied
data.value: Cover URL applied to book image field.

data.name: NoAuthorsFoundMatchingName
data.value: No authors found matching that name.

data.name: IdentityVerifiedLibrarianLocked
data.value: Your identity was verified by a librarian. Your essential identification details are now locked for security.

data.name: VisitLibraryToVerify
data.value: Visit the library with a valid ID document to verify your account and unlock more features.

data.name: IdentityVerifiedLocked
data.value: Locked: Identity has been verified physically.

data.name: FiscalCodeVerificationSubject
data.value: Provided Fiscal Code is subject to verification.

data.name: PersonalDataInfo
data.value: Your account contains personal data that you have given us. This page allows you to download or delete that data.

data.name: PersonalDataDeleteWarning
data.value: Deleting this data will permanently remove your account, and this cannot be recovered.

data.name: NoRecoveryCodesLeft
data.value: You have no recovery codes left.

data.name: GenerateNewRecoveryCodesInfo
data.value: You must generate a new set of recovery codes before you can log in with a recovery code.

data.name: GenerateNewRecoveryCodesLink
data.value: You can generate a new set of recovery codes.

data.name: ShouldGenerateNewRecoveryCodes
data.value: You should generate a new set of recovery codes.

data.name: InvalidPhoneNumber
data.value: The phone number provided is not valid.

data.name: ConfirmationLinkSent
data.value: Confirmation link sent. Please check your email.

data.name: VerificationEmailSent
data.value: Verification email sent. Please check your email.

data.name: MaxPasskeysReachedShort
data.value: You have reached the maximum number of allowed passkeys.

data.name: NoPasskeyProvided
data.value: The browser did not provide a passkey.

data.name: PasskeyAddAccountFailed
data.value: The passkey could not be added to your account.

data.name: InvalidPasskeyId
data.value: The specified passkey ID had an invalid format.

data.name: PasskeyDeleteFailed
data.value: The passkey could not be deleted.

data.name: PrivacyPolicyNotAccepted
data.value: Privacy and cookie policy have not been accepted.

data.name: AcceptPolicyToEnable2FA
data.value: You must accept the policy before you can enable two factor authentication.

data.name: BrowserForgottenPrompt2FA
data.value: The current browser has been forgotten. When you login again from this browser you will be prompted for your 2fa code.

data.name: PasswordLengthError
data.value: The {0} must be at least {2} and at max {1} characters long.

data.name: PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: The new password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: BookDescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Enter an optional description or summary for the book...

data.name: IncorrectMathResponse
data.value: Error: Incorrect math challenge response. Please try again.

data.name: FastSubmissionError
data.value: Error: Form submitted too quickly. Please take a moment to review your details.

data.name: RegistrationFinalizationError
data.value: An error occurred while finalizing your account registration. Please try again.

data.name: PasswordsDoNotMatch
data.value: The password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: CannotUnsealWithLoansOrReservations
data.value: Cannot unseal this book because it has active loans or future reservations.

data.name: overActivity
data.value: You may have over activity, please try again later

data.name: PositionBarcodeInsideFrameNote
data.value: Position the barcode inside the frame to scan it.

data.name: BookSealedCannotEdit
data.value: This book is currently sealed (locked). Please unseal it to edit.

data.name: BookSealedCannotChangeCategory
data.value: This book is currently sealed. Please unseal it to change its category.

data.name: BookSealedCannotChangeAvailability
data.value: This book is currently sealed. Please unseal it to change its availability status.

data.name: BookSealedCannotEditDescription
data.value: This book is currently sealed. Please unseal it to edit the description.

data.name: BookSealedCannotEditIsbn
data.value: This book is currently sealed. Please unseal it to edit the ISBN.

data.name: InvalidUrlFormat
data.value: Invalid URL format. Please provide a full absolute URL.

data.name: CoverImageFoundVia
data.value: Cover image found via {0}! See preview below.

data.name: ImageUrlAppliedConfirm
data.value: New image URL applied. Click 'Save' to confirm.

data.name: InvalidIsbnFormatSwitch
data.value: Invalid ISBN format. If you need to save it anyway, use the 'Accept Invalid' switch.

data.name: AuthorLockedCannotEdit
data.value: This author is currently locked. Please unlock (unseal) to edit.

data.name: SealDescription
data.value: When an item is 'Sealed', its core metabolic records are locked for archival consistency. Unseal to enable administrative modifications.

data.name: ContactRepositoryManager
data.value: Contact the repository manager for status confirmation.

data.name: NoFutureProvisions
data.value: No future provisions scheduled for this item.

data.name: PermanentlyRemoveFromArchivalRecord
data.value: Permanently remove this item from the archival record. This action is irreversible.

data.name: SearchByEmailOrNamePlaceholder
data.value: Search by email, name, or username...

data.name: NoPatronsFound
data.value: No patrons found in the archival database.

data.name: ManageSystemAccountRolesAndPermissions
data.value: Manage system account roles and permissions.

data.name: EnterSearchQueryToBegin
data.value: Enter an email or name above to search for patrons.

data.name: ManagerRoleGrantsAccessToAdministrativeTools
data.value: Assigning the 'Manager' role grants this patron partial access to the archival management tools and repository lifecycle actions.

data.name: BooksManagerDescription
data.value: Register and refine the central archival catalog records.

data.name: CompleteTheFormBelowToRegister
data.value: Finalize the primary metadata for the new archival ledger entry.

data.name: NoAuthorsLinkedUseSidebar
data.value: No authors linked. Use the sidebar to locate and associate cataloged authors.

data.name: LocateAuthorsToAssociateWithThisRecord
data.value: Locate authors to associate with this record.

data.name: AssociationNote
data.value: Associating authors preserves the cross-referenced metabolic link across the entire repository taxonomy.

data.name: ManageCatalogedAuthors
data.value: Manage cataloged authors within the repository.

data.name: RegisterNewScholarlyAuthorRecord
data.value: Register a new scholarly author record in the archival ledger.

data.name: VerifyAuthorImageBeforeRegistration
data.value: Verify the author image before final archival registration.

data.name: ArchivalDiscoveryDescription
data.value: Discover works of scholarly significance within our meticulously maintained archival repository. Refine your search using the ledger tools below.

data.name: ArchivalReferenceNote
data.value: Registration in this catalog ensures the preservation and cross-referenced accessibility of the collective literary heritage.

data.name: NoActiveLoansFound
data.value: No active loans found for this patron.

data.name: NoFutureReservationsFound
data.value: No future reservations found for this patron.

data.name: EmailDoesNotMatchIdentityRecord
data.value: Email does not match identity record

data.name: OverdueLoanWarning
data.value: This loan is past its due date!

data.name: ConfirmReturnOf
data.value: Are you sure you want to return the book

data.name: ManageAndConvertReservationsToLoans
data.value: Manage and convert reservations to loans.

data.name: SelectReservationToProceed
data.value: Select a reservation from the list to proceed with loan conversion.

data.name: VerifyCodeOnPatronSubmission
data.value: Verify this code matches the one provided by the patron.

data.name: ConversionTipDescription
data.value: Ensure the patron provides the correct reservation code before finalizing. Once converted, the reservation status will be updated automatically.

data.name: ReviewRestrictionMessage
data.value: You must have borrowed this book at least once to leave a review.

data.name: ManageAndModerateReviews
data.value: Monitor and moderate patron reviews across the collection.

data.name: ModerationGuidelineTip
data.value: Reviews should follow community guidelines. Approving a review makes it visible to all patrons on the book page.

data.name: ReviewAndModeratePatronFeedback
data.value: Carefully review the feedback provided by patrons to ensure it aligns with library standards.

data.name: ReviewPlaceholder
data.value: Share your thoughts about this book... (emoticons welcome! 😊)

data.name: LoanRequiredToReview
data.value: Access Denied: You must have borrowed this book at least once to leave a review.

data.name: ReviewHiddenNotice
data.value: Your review has been saved in a hidden state. You can edit it later and submit it for approval whenever you're ready.

data.name: ReviewPendingNotice
data.value: Thank you! Your review has been submitted. It will be reviewed by our archivists and published soon.

data.name: UnsavedChangesWarning
data.value: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

data.name: HiddenStatusInfo
data.value: This review is currently hidden. Only you can see it. You must hide a review to edit its content.

data.name: VisibleStatusInfo
data.value: This review is currently visible. Hide it if you wish to make further edits.

data.name: CannotEditVisibleReview
data.value: Reviews must be hidden before they can be edited.

data.name: ShareYourThoughtsWithTheCommunity
data.value: Your insights help other archivists and patrons discover the magic within these pages.

data.name: EmoticonsSupportedTip
data.value: Rich text is supported, including emoticons (😊, 📚, ✨).

data.name: ReviewVerificationNotice
data.value: Verified reviews are only allowed for patrons who have previously borrowed the physical copy from our sanctuary.

data.name: AlreadyHasApprovedReview
data.value: Access Denied: You have already submitted an approved review for this book. Each patron is limited to one published review per title.

data.name: ReviewsDisclaimer
data.value: Note: Reviews are submitted by patrons and reflect their personal opinions only.

data.name: ExportErrorGeneric
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during export: {0}

data.name: SemanticSearchPlaceholder
data.value: e.g. A dystopian novel about surveillance and totalitarism...

data.name: SemanticSearchHelp
data.value: This uses AI to find books by meaning rather than exact keywords. Combine with filters below for precise discovery.

data.name: NoVectorDataNote
data.value: No vectorized data is present for that description. Semantic search will not include this item.

data.name: VerifyAIUnderstandingNote
data.value: Verify the AI's understanding by providing a description you believe is semantically similar to this book.

data.name: TopSemanticResult
data.value: This book is the top semantic result.

data.name: FoundInTopResults
data.value: Found in top results, but not first.

data.name: NotInTopResults
data.value: This book did not appear in the top results.

data.name: VectorDbRemovalFailed
data.value: Embedding removed from book but failed to remove from vector database. Restoring book reference.

data.name: UpdateEmbeddingAdvice
data.value: You have updated the description. It is recommended to update the embedding as well for effective semantic alignment.

data.name: ConfirmRemoveEmbedding
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove the semantic embedding for this book?

data.name: ImportInterruptedSummary
data.value: Import interrupted. Results so far: {0} success, {1} failed/skipped

data.name: ProvideTitleOrIsbnForDescription
data.value: Please provide at least a Title or ISBN to generate a description.

data.name: AllowDuplicatesHelp
data.value: Permit books with the same ISBN to be added multiple times.

data.name: GenerateAuthorsHelp
data.value: Create author profiles automatically if they don't exist in the database.

data.name: GenerateEmbeddingsHelp
data.value: Generate AI semantic descriptions for each book (slower import).

data.name: GenerateDescriptionsHelp
data.value: Use AI to generate a book description if it's missing from the library metadata.
